title: FamilyTree
description: Control file for a FamilyTree dataset, stored at .familytree.json in the tree root. Its presence alongside persons/ and relations/ identifies the directory as a FamilyTree dataset.

familytree_version.description: Semantic version of the FamilyTree spec this dataset conforms to (semver, e.g. '0.0.1')

uuid.description: UUID v4 — the tree's stable identity

not_duplicates.description: Pairs of persons confirmed to be distinct individuals, suppressed from ft find-duplicates output

note.description: Free-text reason why these persons are distinct
